revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Bones | Guid=3005-6791 | Deck=This fearsome foe showcases the powers of the Vadrigar, for it has no true life of its own. But it begs the question: "Where do the gibs and blood come from?" | Gender=Non-Binary | Concepts=Concepts/Undead | Enemies= | Franchises=Franchises/Quake | Friends= | Games=Games/Quake_Arena_Arcade,Games/Quake_III_Arena,Games/Quake_Live | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/4432/591683-bones.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"591683-bones.jpg","path":"0\/4432\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_small,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,scale_super,screen_kubrick","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> This fearsome foe showcases the powers of the Vadrigar, for it has no true life of its own. But it begs the question: "Where do the gibs and blood come from?"

{{Character | Name=Boomer | Guid=3005-58577 | Deck=A clone trooper sergeant of the 501st legion during the Clone Wars. | Concepts= | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends= | Games= | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/45/456753/3805568-hq720.jpg}}

{{Character | Name=Boss | Guid=3005-58814 | Deck=The leader of the ABIS police squad in the Somnium Files series. | Concepts=Concepts/Police | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Aiba_58812,Characters/Kaname_Date,Characters/Mizuki_Okiura,Characters/Pewter | Games=Games/AI_The_Somnium_Files,Games/AI_The_Somnium_Files_Nirvana_Initiative,Games/No_Sleep_for_Kaname_Date_From_AI_The_Somnium_File | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The leader of the ABIS police squad in the Somnium Files series.

{{Character |Name=Bristol Weller |Guid=3005-58573 |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/36/361609/3805663-bristol_weller.png |Deck=The main antagonist of Groove on Fight. Bristol was born in a prominent family, he is a very intelligent, yet hypocritical man. He achieved a good social status at a young age and has received several awards for his charity activities, but he uses this to hide his true personality. He is really a heartless, ambitious man that is able to do anything to get what he wants. |Concepts=Concepts/Assist, Concepts/Demon, Concepts/Evil_Laugh, Concepts/Ki, Concepts/Male_Antagonist, Concepts/Rekka_Character, Concepts/Rushdown, Concepts/Sadism, Concepts/SNK_Boss_Syndrome, Concepts/Summoners, Concepts/Terrorist, Concepts/Villain, Concepts/Zoning_Character |Enemies=Characters/Chris_Wayne, Characters/Damian_Shade, Characters/Hizumi_Yukinoue, Characters/Larry_Light, Characters/Solis_R8000, Characters/Sujiroku_Tenjinbashi, Characters/Tane_Goketsu, Characters/Ume_Goketsu |Friends=Characters/Damian_Shade, Characters/Rudolph_Gartheimer |Games=Games/Groove_on_Fight_Gouketsuji_Ichizoku_3 |Locations=Locations/England, Locations/United_Kingdom |Objects=Objects/Gloves, Objects/Gun, Objects/Suit_and_Tie, Objects/Sunglasses }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3805663-bristol_weller.png","path":"36\/361609\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,scale_super,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The main antagonist of Groove on Fight. Bristol was born in a prominent family, he is a very intelligent, yet hypocritical man. He achieved a good social status at a young age and has received several awards for his charity activities, but he uses this to hide his true personality. He is really a heartless, ambitious man that is able to do anything to get what he wants.

{{Character | Name=Bubbles the Dolphin | Guid=3005-58556 | Deck=A dolphin from The SpongeBob Movies: Sponge Out of the Water, which debuted in 2015. | Concepts= | Enemies= | Franchises=Franchises/SpongeBob_SquarePants | Friends= | Games=Games/SpongeBob_HeroPants | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/239/2391650/3803279-bubblesthedolphin.png}}

revision.comment: Restore image alignment, sizes and captions from legacy source (3005-58639)
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Captain Whitewater | Guid=3005-58639 | Deck=“Here you will be safe from the goblins raiding the road.” ― Captain Whitewater. An experienced captain who keeps Lannegar secure. | Concepts=Concepts/Dialogue_Tree | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends= | Games=Games/Exiled_Kingdoms | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/161/1613774/3763955-1011626198-ss_26.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3763955-1011626198-ss_26.jpg","path":"161\/1613774\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,square_medium,square_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_small,square_mini,scale_tiny,square_tiny,square_small,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' />
==Backstory== He is particularly concerned about the goblins infesting the valley.
===Faction=== [https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/Varsilia Varsilia]
==Interactions==
===Location=== * [https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/Lannegar Lannegar]
===Quests=== * [https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/Goblin_Hunt Goblin Hunt] * [https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/The_Lost_Explorer The Lost Explorer] * [https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/Head_Hunting Head Hunting]
===Situational=== * [https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/Lannegar Lannegar] Rep +10 required
==Trait Checks== The following [https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/Trait Trait] checks are associated with this character. Those marked with are mandatory for achieving certain outcomes or rewards which can not be accomplished otherwise.
{| class='wikitable gb-table-natural' |- ! Trait Requirement||Quest||Area||Description |- | [https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/Personality Personality] 1||[https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/The_Lost_Explorer The Lost Explorer]||[https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/Lannegar_(City) Lannegar (City)]||Needed for unlocking some additional dialogue options, either yielding 40 [https://www.exiledkingdoms.com/wiki/index.php/Gold Gold] or 40 XP extra. |}

{{Character | Name=Carlos Idriss Kameni | Guid=3005-58661 | Deck=Idriss Carlos Kameni (born 18 February 1984) is a Cameroonian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper. | Concepts= | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends= | Games=Games/2014_FIFA_World_Cup_Brazil,Games/FIFA_10,Games/FIFA_11,Games/FIFA_12,Games/FIFA_14,Games/FIFA_15,Games/FIFA_16,Games/FIFA_17,Games/FIFA_18,Games/FIFA_19,Games/FIFA_Soccer_13 | Locations=Locations/Cameroon | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3813918-8714964936-11166.png}}

{{Character | Name=Chase | Guid=3005-58771 | Aliases=Track Star,Star Blazer | Deck=A member of the Superhero Dispatch Network (SDN). Once a speedster Superhero named "Trackstar", he was forced to retire due to use of his super-speed accelerating his aging, making him an old man despite technically being in his 30s. | Gender=Male | Concepts=Concepts/Flight,Concepts/Super_Speed,Concepts/Superhero | Enemies=Characters/Invisigal,Characters/Shroud_58847 | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Blonde_Blazer,Characters/Coupe,Characters/Flambae,Characters/Golem_58781,Characters/Invisigal,Characters/Malevola,Characters/Phenomaman,Characters/Prism,Characters/Punch_Up,Characters/Robert_Robertson_III,Characters/Sonar,Characters/Waterboy | Games=Games/Dispatch | Locations=Locations/California | People= | Objects=Objects/Boots,Objects/Coffee_Mug,Objects/Spandex,Objects/Sweater | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3821241-hero_busts_chase.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3821241-hero_busts_chase.png","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,square_medium,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A member of the Superhero Dispatch Network (SDN). Once a speedster Superhero named "Trackstar", he was forced to retire due to use of his super-speed accelerating his aging, making him an old man despite technically being in his 30s.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Chen | Guid=3005-6139 | Deck=One of the many characters in the Touhou Project, she is a Nekomata and the guardian of Ran Yakumo. | Gender=Non-Binary | Concepts=Concepts/Bakeneko,Concepts/Feline_Humanoid,Concepts/Magic | Enemies=Characters/Nazrin | Franchises=Franchises/Touhou_Project | Friends=Characters/Ran_Yakumo,Characters/Yukari_Yakumo | Games=Games/Groove_Coaster_Wai_Wai_Party,Games/Labyrinth_of_Touhou,Games/Labyrinth_of_Touhou_2,Games/Touhou_07_5_Immaterial_and_Missing_Power,Games/Touhou_07_Perfect_Cherry_Blossom,Games/Touhou_09_5_Shoot_the_Bullet,Games/Touhou_10_5_Scarlet_Weather_Rhapsody,Games/Touhou_12_3_Hisoutensoku,Games/Touhou_Mystias_Izakaya | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1679/528292-chen.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"528292-chen.png","path":"0\/1679\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_avatar,scale_small,square_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,scale_super,square_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":""},"background":[]}' />
==Overview== Chen is a Nekomata, and the Shikigami of [[Characters/Ran_Yakumo|Ran Yakumo]]. During the events of ''[[Games/Touhou_07_Perfect_Cherry_Blossom|''Perfect Cherry Blossom'']]'', she was guarding the village of Mahoyiga, although there wasn't much she could do as her powers were limited due to her being too far away from her master. Later on, however, during the Extra Stage, she guards the path to Ran, and this time, she is much more powerful due to being in close proximity of her master.
She has dark orange eyes and brown hair, and wears a red and light pink outfit with gold trimming, as well as a green hat. She has cat ears, one of which has a gold earring in it, as well as two tails.
==Trivia== * Chen's name, "橙", can literally be translated into "bitter orange". All of the Yakumo family are named after colours. * Widely known as THE BLACK CAT OF ILL OMEN

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Chi-Chi | Guid=3005-9302 | Deck=Goku's Wife in the Dragon Ball Series. She can be very overprotective of her children. She often worries when they go off to fight. | Gender=Non-Binary | Concepts=Concepts/Cartoon_Character,Concepts/Chinese_Mythology,Concepts/Descendants_of_Other_Characters,Concepts/Flanderization,Concepts/Games_Based_on_Anime,Concepts/Ki,Concepts/Licensed_Game,Concepts/Martial_Arts,Concepts/Pregnancy,Concepts/Royalty,Concepts/Secret_Identity,Concepts/Voice_Acting,Concepts/World_Martial_Arts_Tournament,Concepts/Z_Fighters | Enemies=Characters/Android_16,Characters/Android_17,Characters/Android_19,Characters/Cell,Characters/Cell_Jr,Characters/Cellin,Characters/Frieza,Characters/Goku_Black,Characters/Mai_12863,Characters/Majin_Buu,Characters/Pilaf,Characters/Raditz,Characters/Shu_29026,Characters/Syn_Shenron,Characters/Vegeta | Franchises=Franchises/Dragon_Ball,Franchises/Dragon_Ball_GT,Franchises/Dragon_Ball_Raging_Blast,Franchises/Dragon_Ball_Z,Franchises/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_Tenkaichi | Friends=Characters/Android_18,Characters/Bulma,Characters/Bulpan,Characters/Dr_Brief,Characters/Future_Trunks,Characters/Gohan,Characters/Goku,Characters/Goten,Characters/Gotenks,Characters/Krillin,Characters/Marron,Characters/Master_Roshi,Characters/Mrs_Brief,Characters/Tarble,Characters/The_Great_Saiyaman,Characters/Trunks,Characters/Vegeta,Characters/Yamcha | Games=Games/Dragon_Ball_3_Gokuuden,Games/Dragon_Ball_GT_Transformation,Games/Dragon_Ball_Online,Games/Dragon_Ball_Origins,Games/Dragon_Ball_Raging_Blast_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_RPG_Shounen_hen,Games/Dragon_Ball_Sparking_Zero,Games/Dragon_Ball_The_Breakers,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_2_Super_Battle,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Attack_of_the_Saiyans,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_3,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_Tenkaichi_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_Tenkaichi_3,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Buus_Fury,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Extreme_Butouden,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Gaiden_Saiyajin_Zetsumetsu_Keikaku,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Gekitou_Tenkaichi_Budoukai,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Goku_Hishoden,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Harukanaru_Densetsu,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Idainaru_Son_Goku_Densetsu,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_III_Ressen_Jinzou_Ningen,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Kakarot,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Kyoushuu_Saiyajin,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Legendary_Super_Warriors,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Shin_Butoden,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Super_Butoden_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Super_Gokuden_Kakusei_Hen,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Super_Gokuden_Totsugeki_Hen,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Supersonic_Warriors_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_The_Legacy_of_Goku,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_The_Legacy_of_Goku_II,Games/Dragon_Power,Games/Dragonball_Evolution,Games/DragonBall_Z_Buus_Fury_Dragon_Ball_GT_Transformation,Games/DragonBall_Z_Dokkan_Battle,Games/Famicom_Jump_II_Saikyou_no_Shichinin,Games/IC_Carddass_DragonBall,Games/J_Legend_Retsuden,Games/Super_Dragon_Ball_Z | Locations=Locations/Capsule_Corp_Headquarters,Locations/Kame_House,Locations/Kamis_Lookout | People=People/Andrea_Libman,People/Carol_Anne_Day,People/Kimlinh_Tran,People/Laara_Sadiq,People/Laura_Bailey,People/Lisa_Ann_Beley | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/3/34651/3471471-5950482682-latest.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3471471-5950482682-latest.png","path":"3\/34651\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_avatar,square_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Chi Chi first appears in the series Dragon Ball. Chi Chi meets Goku and his friends while he is on his quest to find the Dragon Balls for the first time in the series.
Chi Chi is the daughter of the Great Ox King.
Chi-Chi is often depicted as a sometimes nagging, overprotective but fundamentally well-meaning woman, similar to the stereotypical overbearing shōnen mother. Though her power pales in comparison to most of the Z Fighters, she is still one of the strongest women in the world, and has been seen fighting well above the level of an average human on more than one occasion. She is also shown to be mentally clumsy at times, such as when she hits Krillin in the head with a door, thinking he is Gohan. Although Chi Chi often seen yelling at Goku over fighting, or Gohan over his school work, it cannot be argued that she loves Goku and her family very much. This is shown at the end of the Buu Saga when she is brought to tears just over the thought of finally getting to live as a family of four with Goku, Gohan, and Goten.
When Goku, Bulma, and Oolong are lead by the dragon radar to Fire Mountain they meet The Great Ox King. Bested in battle by Goku The Ox King sends Goku on a quest to find his daughter Chi Chi and then the Bancho Fan, that was currently in the possession of the Great Martial Arts Master, Master Roshi. The Bancho Fan supposedly had the power to put out the fire on Fire Mountain were The Ox King's castle stood atop and a Dragon Ball inside.
Goku and Chi Chi ride the Flying Nymbus at great speeds towards Master Roshi's Island only to find out when they get there that Master Roshi had used the Bancho Fan as a place mat and thrown it away after getting it dirty. Master Roshi then tells Chi Chi and Goku that he himself will go and put out the fires of Fire Mountain because The Ox King had once been a pupil of his.
Chi Chi and Goku return with Master Roshi to Fire Mountain were The Ox King and Goku's friends are eager to find out how this little old man plans on putting out the inferno. After Master Roshi puts out the fire and destroys Fire Mountain with it The Ox King rewards Goku's efforts with the Dragon Ball provided they can find it and Chi Chis hand in marriage.
Chi Chi appears several more times during the Dragon Ball Series.
Chi Chi then later appears in the Dragon Ball Z Series as Goku's wife and the mother of there son Gohan.

{{Character | Name=Chica | Guid=3005-58800 | Concepts= | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends= | Games= | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Character |Name=Chris Wayne |Guid=3005-58565 |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/36/361609/3804509-chris_wayne.png |Deck=The son of Keith and Annie, who is extremely violent boy, he is able to hurt anyone at the drop of a hat. Chris often has troubles with his parents due to his bad behavior and to get distance from them, he accompanied his professor and friend Larry in his journey (Chris told his parents that the journey was for "educational purposes"). |Concepts=Concepts/Descendants_of_Other_Characters, Concepts/Gangs, Concepts/Lightning_Manipulation, Concepts/Mix_Up, Concepts/Profanity, Concepts/Rekka_Character, Concepts/Rushdown, Concepts/Sadism, Concepts/Sexualized_Men, Concepts/Shoto_clone |Enemies=Characters/Bristol_Weller, Characters/Damian_Shade, Characters/Hizumi_Yukinoue, Characters/Rudolph_Gartheimer |Friends=Characters/Anny_Hamilton, Characters/Keith_Wayne, Characters/Larry_Light |Games=Games/Groove_on_Fight_Gouketsuji_Ichizoku_3 |Locations=Locations/The_United_States_of_America |Objects=Objects/Balisong, Objects/Cowboy_Hat, Objects/Hat, Objects/Knife, Objects/Necklace, Objects/Tattoo }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3804509-chris_wayne.png","path":"36\/361609\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,square_small,scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_tiny,screen_medium,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The son of Keith and Annie, who is extremely violent boy, he is able to hurt anyone at the drop of a hat. Chris often has troubles with his parents due to his bad behavior and to get distance from them, he accompanied his professor and friend Larry in his journey (Chris told his parents that the journey was for "educational purposes").

{{Character |Guid=c8b7cb9c-42d5-487e-891e-ea393e7d603b |Name=Cielo Salinas |Image=Cieloprofile.png |Deck=The main protagonist of Virtua Fighter Crossroads. |Gender=Male |Concepts=Concepts/Fighter, Concepts/Mixed Martial Arts |Friends=Characters/Pai Chan |Games=Games/Virtua Fighter 92377 }} Paraguayan/American MMA fighter who lives in a (fictional) Southeast Asian city called Vilasapara, training for a fighting tournament.

{{Character | Name=Coupé | Guid=3005-58779 | Deck=A former Supervillain who used to work for the mob as an assassin, now a member of Z-Team at the Superhero Dispatch Network. Has umbrakinetic powers and an affinity for throwing knives. In a relationship with Punch-Up. | Concepts=Concepts/Assassin,Concepts/Darkness,Concepts/Flight,Concepts/Lawbreaking,Concepts/Multiple_Endings,Concepts/Organized_Crime,Concepts/Superhero,Concepts/Supervillain,Concepts/The_Mob,Concepts/Villain_Turned_Good | Enemies=Characters/Armstrong,Characters/Blonde_Blazer,Characters/Flambae,Characters/Golem_58781,Characters/Invisigal,Characters/Malevola,Characters/Phenomaman,Characters/Prism,Characters/Punch_Up,Characters/Robert_Robertson_III,Characters/Shroud_58847,Characters/Sonar,Characters/Waterboy | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Blonde_Blazer,Characters/Chase_58771,Characters/Flambae,Characters/Golem_58781,Characters/Invisigal,Characters/Malevola,Characters/Phenomaman,Characters/Prism,Characters/Punch_Up,Characters/Robert_Robertson_III,Characters/Shroud_58847,Characters/Waterboy | Games=Games/Dispatch | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Knife,Objects/Mask,Objects/Spandex,Objects/Thigh_High_Boots,Objects/Throwing_Knife,Objects/Wings | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3821255-dossier_coupe.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3821255-dossier_coupe.png","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A former Supervillain who used to work for the mob as an assassin, now a member of Z-Team at the Superhero Dispatch Network. Has umbrakinetic powers and an affinity for throwing knives. In a relationship with Punch-Up.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Character | Name=Daggett Beaver | Guid=3005-58554 | Deck=From The Angry Beavers for Nickelodeon. | Concepts= | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Norbert_Beaver | Games=Games/Nickelodeon_All_Star_Brawl_2,Games/Nicktoons_Racing | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/239/2391650/3803264-daggett_beaver.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3803264-daggett_beaver.png","path":"239\/2391650\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,square_medium,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> From The Angry Beavers for Nickelodeon.

{{Character |Name=Damian Shade |Guid=3005-58626 |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/36/361609/3811376-damian_shade.png |Deck=Damian is an orphan, who was adopted by the Gartheimer family. With time, he became a very special person to his master, Rudolph. Damian is a pacifist and dislikes violence, but his personality totally changes if someone tries to hurt his master. He has a special power that allows him to heal a living being just by touching them. |Concepts=Concepts/Androgyny, Concepts/Fire, Concepts/Fire_Manipulation, Concepts/Healer, Concepts/LGBT, Concepts/Romance, Concepts/Shoto_clone, Concepts/Unlockables |Enemies=Characters/Bristol_Weller, Characters/Chris_Wayne, Characters/Hizumi_Yukinoue, Characters/Larry_Light, Characters/Solis_R8000, Characters/Sujiroku_Tenjinbashi, Characters/Tane_Goketsu, Characters/Ume_Goketsu |Friends=Characters/Bristol_Weller, Characters/Rudolph_Gartheimer |Games=Games/Groove_on_Fight_Gouketsuji_Ichizoku_3 |Locations=Locations/Canada |Objects=Objects/Boots, Objects/Lipstick, Objects/Rose }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3811376-damian_shade.png","path":"36\/361609\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,square_small,square_medium,scale_super,square_avatar,scale_small,square_tiny,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Damian is an orphan, who was adopted by the Gartheimer family. With time, he became a very special person to his master, Rudolph. Damian is a pacifist and dislikes violence, but his personality totally changes if someone tries to hurt his master. He has a special power that allows him to heal a living being just by touching them.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Deja Vu | Guid=3005-23142 | Deck=Deja Vu is one of the bosses of the game Freedom Force and character universe the Marvel Comics. He can levitate and create their doubles. | Gender=Male | Concepts=Concepts/Clone | Enemies= | Franchises=Franchises/Freedom_Force | Friends= | Games=Games/Freedom_Force | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/15/155745/2185151-dejavu.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"2185151-dejavu.jpg","path":"15\/155745\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_small,scale_small,scale_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_super,screen_kubrick","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> Deja Vu is one of the bosses of the game Freedom Force and character universe the Marvel Comics. He can levitate and create their doubles.

{{Character | Name=Demon Mouse | Guid=3005-58633 | Concepts=Concepts/Glowing_Eyes,Concepts/Living_Toys,Concepts/Mouse | Enemies=Characters/Hilda_58632,Characters/Kamila_58629,Characters/Margaret_58630,Characters/Super_Granny | Franchises=Franchises/Super_Granny | Friends= | Games=Games/Super_Granny_4 | Locations=Locations/Cannery,Locations/Egypt | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Character | Name=Dewey Largo | Guid=3005-58782 | Concepts= | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends= | Games=Games/The_Simpsons_Night_of_The_Living_Treehouse_of_Horror | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Character | Name=Dexter Hoover | Guid=3005-58493 | Concepts= | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends= | Games=Games/Cars_Fast_as_Lightning | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Character |Guid=7ac5314a-85bb-483e-ba52-6b5dd46dc7da |Name=Diana |Image=Diana profile.png |Deck=A "Pragmata" taking on the form of a little girl, Hugh's partner throughout the game. |RealName=D-1-0336-7 |Concepts=Concepts/Robot |Friends=Characters/Hugh Williams |Games=Games/Pragmata }} D-1-0336-7, a Lunafilament construct known as a "Pragmata," in the form of a little girl. She saves Hugh Williams from the brink of death when he is separated from his team during a Lunar Quake and left for dead. After rescuing Hugh, Hugh gives her the name Diana after her initial D. Diana helps Hugh fight IDUS and its constructs through the station in hopes they can travel to Earth together.
